linkedin.text:
"Yossi cried. His manager cried. I cried." We don't ask clients for reviews. We ask for one moment.

Here's what they told us:

"Our CEO handed Yossi — 18 years with us, the best quarter of his career — his award personally, in front of 80 colleagues. That moment was worth more than any salary I could have offered."
— VP Sales, tech company (Barcelona)

"We walked into a private cooking studio in Rome set up like a real competition — team names, stations, a chef judge. I've never seen Israeli executives so focused on who could make the best pasta."
— HR Director, insurance (Rome)

"We'd done company trips before. Always fine. Never remarkable. This was the first time I heard 'I've never done anything like this.' That's what we paid for."
— CEO, healthcare (Prague)

We don't build events. We build moments.

📅 Book a free 30-minute call and let's design yours.

#EmployeeEngagement #IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership

facebook.text:
We never ask clients to write a testimonial. We ask them one question: describe a single moment from the trip. 💬

A VP of Sales told us about the night his CEO walked over to Yossi — 18 years with the company, the best quarter of his career — and handed him an award in front of 80 colleagues. "Yossi cried. His manager cried. I cried. That was worth more than any salary."

An HR director described walking into a Rome cooking studio set up like a real competition — and watching her executives turn fiercely competitive over pasta.

Nobody remembers the hotel. Everybody remembers the moment.

What's the one moment from a trip you'll never forget? Tell us in the comments. 💬
